name: Pickled Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons dill seed or 1 head dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the asparagus thoroughly.
2. Pack the asparagus into clean jars.
3. Add the spices: cayenne, garlic, and dill seed (or chopped dill).
4. Mix together 2 and 1/2 cups vinegar, 1/4 cup salt, and 2 and 1/2 cups water to form the pickling solution.
5. Pour the mixture into the jars until there is about 1/2 inch of headspace at the top.
6. Process in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
7. This recipe makes approximately 7 quarts. Note that one box (20 pounds) of fresh asparagus will yield around 10 quarts.
